name: sevacare-unified
description: SevaCare Elder Care Management System - Unified Repository

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../shared && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.start: npm run start:prod -w backend & npm run start -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
